attributes.html:
YARA Signature Match - THOR APT Scanner

RULE: SUSP_PS1_Base64_IEX_Pattern_Jun23_1
RULE_SET: Livehunt - Suspicious186 Indicators 🏹
RULE_TYPE: THOR APT Scanner's rule set only 🔨
RULE_LINK: https://valhalla.nextron-systems.com/info/rule/SUSP_PS1_Base64_IEX_Pattern_Jun23_1
DESCRIPTION: Detects a string combination often found in malicious PowerShell one-liners (but could also be used in legitimate scripts) that pass an encoded blob to an IEX command
REFERENCE: https://twitter.com/pmelson/status/1668577803397210117?s=20
RULE_AUTHOR: Florian Roth

Detection Timestamp: 2023-09-25 23:11
AV Detection Ratio: 🟢 60 / 72

Use these tags to search for similar matches: #ps1 #iex #pattern #susp_ps1_base64_iex_pattern_jun23_1
More information: https://www.nextron-systems.com/notes-on-virustotal-matches/
